name: Samosa Chaat
description: Crisp pastry parcels stuffed with spiced potato and peas, topped with tangy tamarind and mint chutneys, yogurt, and sev.

name: Chicken Seekh Kebab
description: Minced chicken skewers grounded with ginger, garlic, and garam masala, char-grilled in the tandoor.

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Cubes of cottage cheese marinated in yogurt and spices, grilled with bell peppers and onions.

name: Vegetable Spring Rolls
description: Crispy rolls filled with julienned vegetables, served with a sweet chilli dip.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Tandoori chicken simmered in a rich tomato and butter gravy, finished with cream.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Grilled chicken tikka pieces in a spiced onion-tomato masala gravy with a good kick of chilli and garam masala.

name: Dal Makhani
description: Black lentils and kidney beans slow-cooked overnight with butter and cream.

name: Vegetable Korma
description: Mixed seasonal vegetables in a mild, creamy cashew-based gravy.

name: Chana Masala
description: Chickpeas simmered in a tangy onion-tomato masala with cumin and dried mango powder. No dairy used.

name: Lamb Rogan Josh
description: Slow-braised lamb in a Kashmiri red chilli and yogurt gravy.

name: Garlic Naan
description: Leavened tandoori flatbread topped with garlic and coriander.

name: Masala Chai
description: Spiced milk tea brewed with cardamom, ginger, and cloves.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Deep-fried milk dumplings soaked in rose-cardamom sugar syrup, served warm.

name: Fries
description: Crispy salted potato fries, served with ketchup.

name: Pistachio Kulfi
description: Traditional frozen milk dessert flavoured with pistachio and cardamom.
